zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Bohun於1342年3月25日出生在英國艾可洛福德時，他的父親William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton31歲，母親Elizabeth Badlesmere29歲。他於1359年9月9日與Joan FitzAlan結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年1月16日在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比享年30歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

variants.name: Humphry

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Bohun was born on 25 March 1342, in Rochford, Essex, England, his father, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Badlesmere, was 29. He married Joan FitzAlan on 9 September 1359. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 16 January 1373, in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Bohun est né le 25 mars 1342, à Rochford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Badlesmere, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan FitzAlan le 9 septembre 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1373, à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Bohun am 25. März 1342 in Rochford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Badlesmere 29. Er hat am 9. September 1359 Joan FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Januar 1373 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England und wurde in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Bohun è nato il il 25 marzo 1342 nel Rochford, Essex, England, il suo padre, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Badlesmere, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan FitzAlan il 9 settembre 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1373, nel Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Bohunが1342年3月25日にイギリスエセックスロチフォードで生まれた時，父William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northamptonは31歳，母Elizabeth Badlesmereは29歳であった。1359年9月9日にJoan FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年1月16日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーで30歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Bohun(이)가 1342년 3월 25일 영국 에세스 록h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Badlesmere(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1359년 9월 9일 Joan FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 1월 16일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Bohun nasceu em 25 de março de 1342, em Rochford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Badlesmere, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan FitzAlan em 9 de setembro de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1373, em Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Bohun родился 25 марта 1342 г. в местности рочфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Bohun 1st Earl of Northampton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Badlesmere, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan FitzAlan 9 сентября 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1373 г. в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.
